message:
🌱 virtual-kubelet: Feature: Implement Port forwarding (#1878)

* 🌱 Add virtual-kubelet: Feature: Implement Port forwarding mission

* 🌱 Add virtual-kubelet: Feature: Implement Port forwarding mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: replace closed virtual-kubelet PR #330 with merged PR #1102

The original fix PR virtual-kubelet/virtual-kubelet#330 was closed
without merging. Replace with #1102 which was merged and adds
port forwarding support to node/api (explicitly closes #170).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "virtual-kubelet-170-feature-implement-port-forwarding",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "virtual-kubelet: Feature: Implement Port forwarding",
+    "description": "Feature: Implement Port forwarding. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current virtual-kubelet deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your virtual-kubelet version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=virtual-kubelet\nhelm list -n virtual-kubelet 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working virtual-kubelet installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review virtual-kubelet configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant virtual-kubelet configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=virtual-kubelet\nkubectl get configmap -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=virtual-kubelet\n```\n**Alpha Release**\n\nThere's a need to be able to open a port on the host running kubectl and tunnel through to a port on a Pod. We need to implement this capability in VK, which will likely require an update to the Provider interface."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature: Implement Port forwarding",
+        "description": "IIUC this is not as trivial as an interface addition but actually requires the VK to support SPDY (which is part of moby/spdystream) so the kube-apiserver can do async bidirectional streaming. SPDY is a deprecated in favor of HTTP/2 but Kubernetes still relies a lot on it and the only other supported alternative is Websockets, which I'm unsure if supports port-forwarding.\n\nSo is this something we want to tackle now, soon, later, or just a moonshot?\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=virtual-kubelet\nkubectl get events -n virtual-kubelet --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature: Implement Port forwarding\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "IIUC this is not as trivial as an interface addition but actually requires the VK to support SPDY (which is part of moby/spdystream) so the kube-apiserver can do async bidirectional streaming. SPDY is a deprecated in favor of HTTP/2 but Kubernetes still relies a lot on it and the only other supported alternative is Websockets, which I'm unsure if supports port-forwarding.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "virtual-kubelet",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "virtual-kubelet"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/virtual-kubelet/virtual-kubelet/issues/170",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/virtual-kubelet/virtual-kubelet"
+    },
+    "reactions": 0,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with virtual-kubelet installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-01T06:58:26.203Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}

+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "virtual-kubelet-170-feature-implement-port-forwarding",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "virtual-kubelet: Feature: Implement Port forwarding",
+    "description": "Feature: Implement Port forwarding. Requested by 0+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current virtual-kubelet deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your virtual-kubelet version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=virtual-kubelet\nhelm list -n virtual-kubelet 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working virtual-kubelet installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review virtual-kubelet configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant virtual-kubelet configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=virtual-kubelet\nkubectl get configmap -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=virtual-kubelet\n```\n**Alpha Release**\n\nThere's a need to be able to open a port on the host running kubectl and tunnel through to a port on a Pod. We need to implement this capability in VK, which will likely require an update to the Provider interface."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Feature: Implement Port forwarding",
+        "description": "This PR adds a new interface to support port forwarding. It takes the approach of adding a smaller interface, with the API server checking to see if a provider implements that smaller interface. \n\nThe plumbing from the API server to the provider endpoint is vendored from k8s. \n\nThe implementation of port forward in the ACI module is pretty close to what the Docker Shim does with socat in the normal kubelet, with identical user experience.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: linked PR"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n virtual-kubelet -l app.kubernetes.io/name=virtual-kubelet\nkubectl get events -n virtual-kubelet --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Feature: Implement Port forwarding\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This PR adds a new interface to support port forwarding. It takes the approach of adding a smaller interface, with the API server checking to see if a provider implements that smaller interface. \n\nThe plumbing from the API server to the provider endpoint is vendored from k8s.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
